evidence: Browser desktop smoke: no console errors, no horizontal overflow, no mojibake, achievement labels render with ASCII separators, history panel exists, primary button min-height is 44px.
Browser mobile smoke at 390x844: no horizontal overflow, timer actions are sticky at bottom 10px, primary button min-height is 44px.
Dialog smoke at 390x844: editor rows stack to one column, form overflow is auto, activity/rest options exist, move/remove/close labels are clear.
remaining_risk: No automated visual regression suite exists for this static app.
Target 9.5 remains aspirational without a full rubric evaluator that runs all interactions from a clean browser profile.
